name: Mobile bottom navigation appears on small viewport
description: On mobile viewport sizes, the sidebar is hidden and a bottom navigation bar appears with Home, Review, Feynman, Research, and Room links.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page and log in with valid credentials
Verify that on a mobile-sized viewport, a bottom navigation bar is visible at the bottom of the screen with navigation icons for Home, Review, Feynman, Research, and Room
